content:
# Operating Guide

A task queue, görevleri sırayla işleyen yapıyı ifade eder.

## Options

- Review the input
- Approve the output

## Procedure

1. Open the panel
2. Confirm the selection

## Code sample

```ts
const selected = readInput();
applySelection(selected);
```

Metric,Period A,Period B
Requests,1400,1800
Latency,21,19
Errors,12,9
Capacity,720,760
Availability,99.90,99.94
Processed,1200,1430
Queued,31,27
Retried,8,6
Succeeded,1180,1410
Failed,20,20
Duration,42,38
Throughput,60,72
